description:
Product information:

Sensitive connection | 4 ports with the same drive | Support OTG expansion | Compact and portable
Sensitive and smooth
4 ports can be used at the same time to meet multiple needs
12TB hard drive easily read
With charging port, it can easily drive 12TB large-capacity hard drives or high-power devices
No need for power supply to drive 2 hard drives
Without power supply, it can easily drive two 2.5-inch 1TB hard drives
Support hot plug and play
Automatic installation of the driver, simple and convenient operation


Packing list:Computer splitter*1
